objective: Improve the generalizable quality of future revenue, operating-profit and GAAP-attributable-net-income reasoning; never optimize a validator score.
non_compensatory_invariants: model identity, current-evidence provenance, source-date and vintage integrity, and publication-snapshot binding
definition, period, unit, currency and accounting-basis compatibility
hard_research_invariants: declared readiness no higher than independent review cap
independent_judgments: authority scope and unresolved source conflict
management, expert and analyst incentive or common-origin bias
cycle, competition, moat and mean-reversion duration
materiality_policy: case-specific effect on causal thesis, profit or decision; never an assigned weight or universal percentage
